product.applications: Solvent drying, air dehydration, cracked gas polishing
product.specs: Aperture 3Å; high crush strength; low water uptake
product.overview: A 3A molecular sieve is used where only water must be removed while avoiding co-adsorption of larger molecules.
product.technicalNotes: Preferred for drying of solvents and compressed air; regeneration conditions depend on operating temperature and cycle design.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
